overall.description: A smooth drone flythrough in Microsoft Flight Simulator showcasing Habitat 67 in Montreal. The camera travels along an industrial waterfront, follows a tree-lined road, and approaches the iconic brutalist residential complex, ending with a close-up view of the stacked concrete architecture.

agents.ego_description: flying low along the waterfront road parallel to a large industrial warehouse

entered.detail: long rectangular concrete building with flat roof along the waterfront
calm waterway separating the road from the industrial buildings
paved road running parallel to the water with lane markings
cluster of modern high-rise buildings visible in the distance across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright summer day at an industrial waterfront. The camera moves steadily along a paved road with a large concrete warehouse on the left across the water, and the distant city skyline visible ahead. The scene is devoid of people or vehicles, emphasizing the architectural forms and waterfront setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined waterfront road approaching residential complex

events.description: turns right from industrial waterfront onto a tree-lined road with water on the left
Habitat 67 building complex becomes visible in the distance on the right

agents.ego_description: traveling along a curved road bordered by trees on the right and water on the left, approaching the distinctive stacked concrete structure

entered.detail: dense row of green deciduous trees lining the right side of the road
distinctive brutalist residential complex with stacked concrete box units visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a scenic road flanked by lush trees on the right and the waterway on the left. As the drone progresses, the unique stacked architecture of Habitat 67 gradually appears on the right horizon, marking the transition from industrial to residential waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy approach to brutalist residential landmark

events.description: turns right off the asphalt road onto the grassy slope leading toward Habitat 67
text overlay 'HABITAT 67' appears on screen identifying the landmark

agents.ego_description: ascending the grassy hill and approaching the base of the Habitat 67 structure for a close-up view

entered.detail: well-manicured green lawn with gentle slope leading up to the building
narrow paved walkway cutting through the grass toward the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the road behind, the camera glides over the grassy slope toward the iconic Habitat 67. The brutalist architecture dominates the frame as the drone approaches, revealing the intricate stacking of concrete residential units. The segment concludes with a close-up view of the building's textured facade and geometric forms.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stark industrial waterfront that gradually transforms into an intimate encounter with the brutalist geometry of Habitat 67. It begins on a bright summer day, gliding along a paved road beside a large concrete warehouse with the distant city skyline framing the horizon. As the camera turns, the industrial landscape shifts into a scenic route flanked by lush trees and the waterway, while the unique stacked architecture of the residential complex slowly emerges on the right. The scene then expands as the drone leaves the road to glide over a grassy slope, allowing the massive concrete structure to dominate the frame. Finally, the movement culminates in a close-up view that reveals the intricate textures and geometric forms of the building's stacked facade.
